summary: Comprehensive testing of Gallery CRM (Aslanbaş Oto) Add Car modal with chained dropdowns. All dropdown features including Model Year (1990-2027), Brand→Model chaining, Brand→Package chaining, Province→District chaining are working correctly. Backend APIs passing 8/8 tests. Frontend form submission successfully creates cars with province/district data.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside option/select) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality
Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning

passed_tests: Model Year dropdown has years from 2027 to 1990 (38 options)
Brand dropdown has 62 brands including BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Toyota, Volkswagen, Audi
Chained Brand→Model: BMW shows correct models (3 Serisi, 5 Serisi, etc.)
Changing brand resets model selection to empty
Motor dropdown has 136 engine types (2.0 TDI, 1.6 TSI, etc.)
Brand-specific Package: BMW shows M Sport, Sport Line; Mercedes shows AMG Line
Province (İl) dropdown has all 82 options (81 provinces + Seçiniz)
District (İlçe) dropdown disabled when no province selected
Chained Province→District: İstanbul shows 40 districts including Kadıköy, Beşiktaş
Ekspertiz tab: Body parts (Kaput, Tavan, etc.) with 4 status options working
Ekspertiz tab: Mechanical parts (Motor, Şanzıman, Yürüyen) working
Sahiplik/Konsinye tab: Stok and Konsinye options toggle correctly
Konsinye mode shows owner fields (name, phone, payment, commission)
Form submission creates car with province=İstanbul, district=Kadıköy correctly
Backend API: POST /api/cars accepts province and district fields
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: React hydration warning due to Emergent span elements inside select/option - cosmetic issue only
seed_data_creation: Created test car with plate TEST_34XY999 during testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: All chained dropdown features working correctly. Model year dropdown generates years dynamically from 1990 to current year+1. Brand→Model and Brand→Package use data from carData.js. Province→District uses data from turkeyData.js. Backend CarBase model has province and district string fields. Form validation requires: brand, model, plate, sale_price, purchase_price (for stock).
